_comment: Single source of truth for the accepted SWTools runtime artifact hashes. Current accepted package: releases/1.1.6/SWTools-1.1.6-Setup.exe, setup sha256 07419a463375b780e6fcea8b0d8b4f9a6e97a148ed5fc4d8e1198d8574978333. Both scripts/verify_release_package.ps1 and scripts/sw_test_preflight.ps1 load their default expected hashes from this file. Update here when the accepted build changes.
